differential_diagnoses: Echis ocellatus (carpet viper) envenomation with severe coagulopathy
Acute kidney injury (acute tubular necrosis vs. cortical necrosis)
next_steps: Remove the tourniquet and assess for local tissue damage
Initiate fluid resuscitation and manage obstetric hemorrhage
Obtain type and cross-match for urgent blood transfusion
Administer parenteral antibiotics and tetanus prophylaxis
Perform urgent obstetric consultation for fetal and maternal stabilization
Monitor urine output, coagulation profile, and hematologic parameters
Transfer to a facility capable of hemodialysis and advanced obstetric care
